name: 飆車追逐
description: 女主搶走豪車後瘋狂飆車，讓養女暈車嘔吐，八位未婚夫在後面追趕。速度感和力量感的視覺呈現，展示女主不受控制的野性。
tags: 豪車速度的視覺刺激 + 養女狼狽的反差 + 追趕者的無能

examples.drama_title: 【ENG DUB】From Convict to Heiress: The Real Daughter's Revenge
examples.excerpt: Parik, don't worry. My driving skills are very steady. ... you did that on purpose. I never meant to be unintentional. ... Bunch of losers couldn't even catch my car's exhaust fumes.
examples.context: 豪車速度的視覺刺激 + 養女狼狽的反差 + 追趕者的無能
